title: Celestial Arcana: Magic Awakens
description: Is an immersive modpack focused on magic, RPG, and exploration.
body:
## **Celestial Arcana: Magic Awakens**

Is an immersive modpack focused on magic, RPG, and exploration, bringing a world filled with sorcery, enhanced structures, and mystical creatures. Inspired by the best elements of the genre, this modpack offers a deep experience for players who wish to explore ancient ruins, uncover arcane secrets, and become masters of magic.

With a diverse spellcasting system, new enchanted jewelry, legendary equipment, and reworked structures, Celestial Arcana completely transforms Minecraft gameplay, adding challenges and mysteries to the journey. Perfect for solo adventurers and groups seeking a unique fantasy experience.

## **Main Features**

Enhanced spells and magic with Spell Engine, Spell Power Attributes, and Runes.

Mystical exploration with YUNG's Better Structures and Moog's Structures.

New classes and equipment with Rogues & Warriors, Paladins & Priests, and Wizards (RPG Series).

Expanded biomes with Oh The Biomes We've Gone and Regions Unexplored.

Improved RPG progression with Relics, Archers, and Jewelry (RPG Series).

Graphical optimization with Iris Shaders and Sodium.

Quality of life improvements with Waystones, Tree Harvester, and AppleSkin.

## **Installation**

Download and install Fabric Loader.

Install Fabric API and the required dependencies.

Add all the listed mods to the "mods" folder.

Launch the game and enjoy the magical journey!

## **Dependencies**

Fabric API (Required)

Architectury API (Necessary for compatibility)

Cloth Config API (Additional configurations)

GeckoLib (Advanced animations)

## **Minecraft Version**

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.1


## **ISSUE TRACK**

### **If you think you find a error or a bug, plesae join us at Discord, and Go to the PpAdrino Chanel, Look for the Issue track Forum page!**
